summary: Smoke fixture for Phase 50 MSF-01 admin silo — empty refinement to keep the doctrine path simple.

proposals.proposed_content: Admin routes for proposal-bulk-actions MUST verify platform_admin capability at the handler entry, BEFORE reading the request body. Currently the requirePlatformAdmin check fires after body parse on the bulk-accept endpoint, which leaks request shape to non-admins via Zod validation errors.

phrasing_examples: bulk accept handler should require admin before parsing
auth gate must be first thing in the handler
source_evidence.reasoning: Two smoke admin sessions reinforced the auth-first-then-parse pattern.
